#Health

#Health

Mental Health at Work: Why the Conversation Has Shifted — and What Still Needs to Change

sophie-delacroixJun 27, 2026

Workplace mental health has moved from a fringe concern to a mainstream HR priority. The gap between rhetoric and structural change remains wide — but there are organizations closing it in ways worth examining.

Sleep Science: What We Now Know About the Brain's Most Important Reset

priya-nambiarJun 26, 2026

Sleep research has transformed in the past two decades. We now understand far more about what happens in the sleeping brain — and why chronic sleep deprivation is among the most consequential health risks modern populations face.
